Physical security operations

One screen. Every security signal in your compound.

SYAG unifies guard management, cameras, IoT sensors, assets, visitors, and flow automation in a single cloud platform — purpose-built for residential compounds and gated communities in the MEA region.

See it live → Explore the platform →

No servers. No integrators. Live in 30 days.

Product dashboard mockup

Trusted by compound security teams across the MEA region

{X} compounds secured {X} incidents resolved {X} guards active daily 30 days average onboarding

The problem every compound faces

You manage one compound. You're running five tools.

Most compounds today operate with a guard management app, a separate VMS for cameras, a spreadsheet for assets, a paper register for visitors, and WhatsApp for everything else. Nothing connects. When something happens, you're switching between screens hoping you catch it in time.

There's a better way.

Everything your compound needs

Five pillars. One platform.

Guard Management

Know where every guard is, every second.

Camera & VMS

Your cameras don't just record — they act.

IoT Devices

Every sensor feeds one security picture.

Asset Management

Everything you own, tracked from day one.

Visitor Management

Know exactly who enters your compound.

Plus: Incident Management, Flow Automation, and a live Operations Center — all included in every plan.

How SYAG works

Connect. Automate. See everything.

Step 1

Connect your compound

Link your cameras, IoT devices, and guard mobile app to SYAG. No hardware changes, no on-site servers. Setup takes days, not months.

Step 2

Set your rules

Use the visual Flow editor to define your security logic. When a camera detects motion at the south gate after midnight, create an incident and notify the nearest supervisor. No developer required.

Step 3

See everything in one screen

Your Operations Center shows every guard, every active incident, every camera event, and every visitor — live, in one place.

Platform highlights

Built for the way compounds actually operate

Guard Management

Track every guard in real time. Assign patrols, verify checkpoints, and receive incident reports — all from mobile, over 4G.

Explore Guard Management →

Flow Automation

Build your security logic visually. Camera trigger → incident created → supervisor notified → guard dispatched. Without writing a line of code.

Explore Flow Automation →

Visitor Management

Pre-register visitors with a QR pass sent by WhatsApp. Guards scan at the gate. Overstays trigger automatic alerts. Blacklisted individuals are flagged on arrival.

Explore Visitor Management →
See all 8 modules →

Guard software tracks guards. Enterprise PSIM costs a fortune. SYAG does both — without the complexity.

See full pricing →

Deploy your way.

Cloud

Fast onboarding with enterprise-grade security. Azure-hosted, fully managed.

Private Cloud

Dedicated environment for sensitive operations. Full data isolation.

Regional

UAE North or KSA data residency for compliance requirements.

Security & compliance

Schema-per-tenant data isolation — your data never touches another compound's records.

End-to-end encryption. TLS 1.3 in transit. AES-256 at rest.

Role-based access control. Full audit trail on every action.

Compliance path available for Saudi NCA and UAE IA requirements.

OAuth 2.0 / OpenID Connect authentication. Zero-trust by design.
